history.note: Created by local Cybrus automated planning for task F6D69798-494B-48BC-AB89-A19941A826E6.

Current code has Maraithon.Crm, crm_people, crm_person_links, CRM tools, ingestion, fuzzy/semantic lookup, and relationship context. Missing from this spec: separate person_identifiers/person_merges/person_notes, model-callable merge, Telegram card serializer, and /people LiveViews.

Upgraded the stale People/CRM spec into a focused delta against the existing Maraithon.Crm implementation: auditable merge, richer source-evidence links, Telegram card serializer, and model-callable merge tooling.
Implemented the CRM delta on Maraithon.Crm, added tests, and verified with mix precommit.

next_action: Pick the next highest-priority ready Spectacula spec and start implementation.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Implemented and verified the CRM merge/source-evidence delta.
resume_context.notes: Done as a focused delta on Maraithon.Crm. Deferred original stale-plan items remain intentionally out of scope: parallel Maraithon.People context, separate identifier tables, People LiveViews, and one-shot historical backfill.

summary: Done as a focused CRM delta: auditable people merges, source-evidence links, Telegram card serializer, and model-callable merge tooling are implemented and verified on top of Maraithon.Crm.
title: Ship People/CRM data model with semantic merge and source links
